semantic.role: Metadata and structural index for a TypeScript database infrastructure source file
responsibilities: Tracking file identity and content integrity via hashes
Declaring semantic role, responsibilities, and invariants for the source file
Recording dependency graph and reverse index completeness
Storing provenance metadata including indexing timestamp and pipeline stages
invariants: File path must be unique and match the project structure
Content hash must be recalculated on every file change to detect drift
Semantic role must be consistent with the file's actual purpose

English.role: Metadata and structural index for a TypeScript database infrastructure source file

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: Defines the version of the ArchSpine schema used for this index entry
parameter_definitions.identity.filePath: Absolute or relative path to the source file within the project
parameter_definitions.identity.contentHash: SHA-like hash of the full file content for integrity verification
parameter_definitions.identity.skeletonHash: Hash of the file's structural skeleton (imports, exports, symbols)
parameter_definitions.identity.semanticHash: Hash of the semantic annotations (role, responsibilities, invariants)
parameter_definitions.identity.language: Programming language of the source file (e.g., typescript)
parameter_definitions.identity.fileKind: Classification of the file (e.g., source, test, config)
parameter_definitions.identity.scope: Logical scope or module area the file belongs to
parameter_definitions.semantic.role: High-level functional description of the file's purpose
parameter_definitions.semantic.responsibilities: List of subsystems or concerns this file manages
parameter_definitions.semantic.outOfScope: Explicitly excluded responsibilities to prevent scope creep
parameter_definitions.semantic.invariants: Mandatory constraints or safety limits enforced by this file
parameter_definitions.semantic.changeIntent.architecturalInten: Original architectural reason for the file's existence
parameter_definitions.semantic.changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Intent behind the most recent modification
parameter_definitions.semantic.publicSurface: Exported symbols or APIs that form the file's public contract
parameter_definitions.semantic.ruleViolations: Detected violations of project rules or conventions
parameter_definitions.semantic.driftDetected: Boolean flag indicating whether the file has drifted from its indexed state
parameter_definitions.semantic.driftReason: Explanation of why drift was detected, if applicable
parameter_definitions.skeleton.imports: List of modules imported by this file
parameter_definitions.skeleton.exports: List of symbols exported from this file
parameter_definitions.skeleton.declaredSymbols: All symbols declared within this file
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.isBarrel: Whether the file acts as a barrel (re-export) module
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.isTypeOnly: Whether the file contains only type definitions
parameter_definitions.graph.dependsOn: Files that this file depends on
parameter_definitions.graph.dependedBy: Files that depend on this file
parameter_definitions.graph.reverseIndexComplete: Whether the reverse dependency index has been fully computed
parameter_definitions.provenance.indexedAt: Timestamp when this index entry was created or last updated
parameter_definitions.provenance.generatorVersion: Version of the ArchSpine tool that generated this entry
parameter_definitions.provenance.pipelineStages: Stages of the indexing pipeline that processed this file

English.stability_and_risks: This configuration file serves as a metadata index for a single source file. It does not directly control runtime behavior but is critical for the ArchSpine mirror system's ability to track file identity, detect drift, and maintain a consistent dependency graph. Risks include: (1) stale or incorrect hashes leading to undetected drift, (2) incomplete reverse index causing inaccurate dependency analysis, and (3) mismatched semantic annotations that misrepresent the file's actual role. System stability relies on the index being regenerated after every file modification to keep hashes and graph edges accurate.

Simplified Chinese.role: TypeScript数据库基础设施源文件的元数据和结构索引

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: 定义此索引条目所使用的ArchSpine模式版本
parameter_definitions.identity.filePath: 项目内源文件的绝对或相对路径
parameter_definitions.identity.contentHash: 文件完整内容的哈希值，用于完整性验证
parameter_definitions.identity.skeletonHash: 文件结构骨架（导入、导出、符号）的哈希值
parameter_definitions.identity.semanticHash: 语义注释（角色、职责、不变条件）的哈希值
parameter_definitions.identity.language: 源文件的编程语言（例如 typescript）
parameter_definitions.identity.scope: 文件所属的逻辑范围或模块区域
parameter_definitions.semantic.role: 对文件功能目的的高级描述
parameter_definitions.semantic.responsibilities: 此文件管理或控制的子系统列表
parameter_definitions.semantic.outOfScope: 明确排除的职责，防止范围蔓延
parameter_definitions.semantic.invariants: 此文件强制执行的约束或安全限制
parameter_definitions.semantic.changeIntent.architecturalInten: 文件存在的原始架构原因
parameter_definitions.semantic.publicSurface: 构成文件公共合约的导出符号或API
parameter_definitions.semantic.ruleViolations: 检测到的违反项目规则或约定的情况
parameter_definitions.semantic.driftDetected: 布尔标志，指示文件是否已偏离其索引状态
parameter_definitions.semantic.driftReason: 如果检测到漂移，说明原因
parameter_definitions.skeleton.imports: 此文件导入的模块列表
parameter_definitions.skeleton.exports: 从此文件导出的符号列表
parameter_definitions.skeleton.declaredSymbols: 在此文件中声明的所有符号
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.isBarrel: 文件是否充当桶模块（重新导出）
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.isTypeOnly: 文件是否仅包含类型定义
parameter_definitions.graph.dependsOn: 此文件依赖的其他文件
parameter_definitions.graph.dependedBy: 依赖此文件的其他文件
parameter_definitions.graph.reverseIndexComplete: 反向依赖索引是否已完全计算
parameter_definitions.graph.symbolEdges: 细粒度的符号级依赖关系边
parameter_definitions.provenance.indexedAt: 此索引条目创建或最后更新的时间戳
parameter_definitions.provenance.generatorVersion: 生成此条目的ArchSpine工具版本
parameter_definitions.provenance.pipelineStages: 处理此文件的索引流水线阶段

Simplified Chinese.stability_and_risks: 此配置文件作为单个源文件的元数据索引。它不直接控制运行时行为，但对于ArchSpine镜像系统跟踪文件身份、检测漂移以及维护一致的依赖关系图至关重要。风险包括：(1) 哈希值过时或不正确导致漂移未被检测到，(2) 反向索引不完整导致依赖分析不准确，(3) 语义注释与实际文件角色不匹配。系统稳定性依赖于每次文件修改后重新生成索引，以保持哈希值和图边的准确性。
